title: Solvite SLV1574677 Overlap & Border Adhesive Tube
features: Easy-spread – The extra-strong wallpaper adhesive is designed with an easy-spread formula, making it ideal for hanging decorative borders and overlapping seams.
Extra-strong – The ready to use wall adhesive is ideal as a vinyl glue for overlapping vinyl to vinyl wallpaper and borders and ensures long-lasting results.
Easy to apply – The practical border adhesive is easy to apply and leaves a smooth finish. The adhesive is designed with an extra-strong formula, ideal for quick repairs.
Easy to use – The border glue is easy to use for a range of every day DIY jobs such as border adhesion, quick wallpaper repairs and overlapping seams.

Package Contents – Solvite Overlap & Border, extra strong wallpaper paste for border adhesion, quick wallpaper repairs & overlapping seams, sticks vinyl to vinyl, easy to apply with smooth finish, 1x240g
description: From the manufacturer Since Solvite first entered the market in 1964, it has become the UK's leading provider of wallpaper adhesives for professional decorators and private consumers. In 1973, Solvite became part of the Henkel company and was a great match for Henkel’s adhesive R&D and manufacturing resources. The name Solvite and its iconic advertising stand for effective, powerful adhesives. It is approved and recommended by the Painting and Decorating Association. Solvite Overlap & Border, Ready to Use Wallpaper Paste Effectively repair wallpaper borders & overlapping seams Keep your wallpaper in top condition with Solvite Overlap & Border. This extra-strong adhesive is ideal for quick repairs and sticking all wall coverings, including vinyl-to-vinyl. It is ideal for hanging decorative borders and overlapping seams. Solvite wallpaper paste for hanging borders, overlapping seams For quick wallpaper repairs Sticks vinyl to vinyl Easy & smooth to apply Long-lasting Format: 1x240g Easy application: For hanging borders: Step 1: Wet pre-plastered borders Step 2: Spread the adhesive evenly on the back of the border Step 3: Fold lengths more than 2 meters whilst pasting Step 4: Finally, press down firmly into position and leave to bond For overlapping seams: Step 1: Spread the adhesive evenly on the bottom piece of wallcovering Step 2: Press the overlapping piece down firmly and leave to bond. Trusted formula The smooth, easy-to-spread formula ensures effortless application and long-lasting results.
